theme.premise: a breezy seaside-boardwalk folktale of a young beachcomber who runs a tiny curiosity shop — combing the tide pools at dawn for shells, sea glass and driftwood, crafting them into trinkets, and ringing up a queue of cheerful seaside patrons by afternoon
theme.tone: sunny, bustling, lightly comic — honest-work satisfaction with a pinch of register-rush pressure
theme.setting: a small wooden boardwalk shop above bright tide pools, mid-morning summer light

concept.core_loop: A repeating day loop with one live decision per second in every phase. GATHER (tide timer): tap resource nodes in the tide pools — near pools give common shells fast, far pools give rare sea glass/pearls but the returning tide sweeps un-banked hauls, so the choice is 'push out for rares or bank what I have'. CRAFT: spend the limited haul on recipes — cheap fast-selling trinkets vs. expensive slow-sellers, steered by today's posted demand hints. SELL (cashier): patrons queue with item wants and draining patience meters; the player chooses WHO to serve next and grabs the matching item off the shelf — serve order vs. patience triage is the decision. Profits buy tool upgrades (bigger haul, rare access, longer tide window) and shop upgrades (more shelves, patron patience, busier queue). Difficulty ramps per day: more patrons, faster patience drain, and demand shifts toward higher-tier recipes needing rare materials — upgrades are the counter-pressure.
mechanics: day cycle with three phases: gather -> craft -> sell, then an upgrade/results screen
tide-pool gather phase: tappable resource nodes (shell/driftwood/sea glass/pearl) over a tide countdown; far nodes rarer; tide-return sweeps unbanked haul (bank action)
crafting screen: 5-6 recipes combining resources into sellable items with tiered prices; daily demand hints
shelf stocking: crafted items placed onto limited shop shelves
cashier sell phase: patron queue with wanted-item bubbles and patience timers; tap patron then tap matching shelf item to ring up; missed patience = patron leaves
gold economy: sales income, running day total
tool upgrade track: haul size, tide window, rare-node access
shop upgrade track: shelf slots, patience slow-down, patron traffic
per-day difficulty ramp: patron count, patience drain, demand tier
persistent save of gold + purchased upgrades + day number
game over is soft: a day with zero stock ends early; restart day available
concept.art_direction: sunny flat-cartoon seaside: sand-cream, sea-teal, coral-orange, driftwood-brown palette with rounded chunky shapes and bold outlines; background treatment: layered beach — warm sky gradient, a drifting sea band with repeating wave-line motifs, planked boardwalk foreground so no phase plays on dead space; motion/feedback beats: coin-sparkle burst + register pulse on every sale, white froth sweep when the tide returns, shelf items pop-scale when stocked, patron patience meters flash red before walk-out
concept.differentiation_notes: Unlike Moonlighter/Recettear there is no combat half — gathering is itself a timed push-your-luck dash against the tide, and the hook is the cashier counter: triaging a live patience queue with your own handcrafted stock, a loop creature-0001's pure survival foraging never enters.

issues: packager/Method5: all CI-checkable packaging gates PASS — package.mjs verify file_checks_pass=true (8 icons at exact px, atlas 18/18 sprites, size_budget 7.4MB<50MiB, export_presets.cfg parses as Android), verify-build ok+signature_ok (43.2MB debug APK com.gameforge.shopkeep_0001, ZIP magic OK), regression headless run clean. Both asset_pass+audio_pass present & owner-A/B-confirmed (styled+scored).

packager/Method5 item-7: owner cross-modal cohesion A/B CONFIRMED ('good enough for this trial, lets do it') — icon/splash/screenshots read as one sunny-handcrafted-seaside world with the visuals+audio; shell icon/splash aesthetic accepted as shippable for the trial. -> packaged.

visual_system.world_bible: One sun-bleached folktale beach town at bright summer mid-morning: a small wooden boardwalk curiosity shop above turquoise tide pools (theme.setting). Every asset is an inhabitant of that one world: natural beach materials (scallop shell, driftwood branch, frosted sea glass, pearl), the handcrafted trinkets made FROM those same materials (charm, frame, pendant, chime, ring, lantern), and cheerful plump blob-bodied beach-villager patrons. No metal/industrial/fantasy-magic registers; gold appears only as warm trinket/coin accents.
visual_system.stroke: checkpoint-native thick clean cartoon outlines (Cartoon Arcadia XL); no hand-authored stroke
visual_system.form: rounded chunky shapes, minimal interior detail, one signature silhouette per item (shell fan-ribs, driftwood gnarl, seaglass facet, chime dangles, lantern pane); patrons are one plump blob-villager family distinguished by colour + one accessory each (straw hat / sailor cap / sunglasses / bow)
visual_system.shading: flat vibrant cel shading with one soft top-light highlight per object; glow halos and all motion feedback stay code-drawn juice
visual_system.scale: sprites tight-cropped to alpha bbox post-gen, contain-fit at draw time (icons into 34-80px square footprints from 512 masters; patrons into a 144x190 zone from 1024 masters; pools squashed into 88x66 for perspective); background opaque full-frame 720x1280 drawn 1:1 under everything
visual_system.prompt_scaffold: shared style fragment 'flat bold cartoon, clean thick outlines, vibrant cel shading' + per-asset subject + 'sticker style, whole object fully visible and centered with empty margins, clean transparent background' for sprites. Shared negatives: anti-crop/anti-scene (cropped, close-up, cut off, abstract, waves, ocean, scene, landscape, multiple objects/characters, frame, border, ground, floor, shadow) + anti-realism (photorealistic, hyperrealistic, 3d render, octane render) + Western-not-anime (anime, manga) + IP guards (logo, watermark, text, trademarked character, brand, celebrity likeness).

style.style_prompt: flat bold cartoon, clean thick outlines, vibrant cel shading, sunny seaside storybook

asset_pass.notes: Swap strategy: draw_texture*-in-place inside the existing inner-class _draw()s (IconView/NodeBlob/PatronView/CoinView) + full-frame backdrop in Main._draw(); all juice (glow halos, bursts, froth sweep, shake, tweens) stays code. left_primitive justifications: icon_pearl = a plain white sphere fought the diffusion medium across 4 regen attempts (lens/swirl/spot attractors) and the code pearl reads clean at 34-48px; boardwalk_planks = kept as the code-drawn bottom band because the painted backdrop's shoreline composition had no boardwalk and the code planks anchor the shop/UI zone; ui_chrome_panels_buttons = canonical code-chrome case (panels/buttons/bars need symmetry + variable sizes diffusion can't deliver). View-only layout remap: gather nodes now map far->painted sea band (y 380-640) and near->wet shoreline (y 764-856) to sit on the painted bands; ShopState logic untouched (SELFTEST OK). All sprites tight-cropped to alpha bbox post-gen (PIL), margins handled by contain-fit at draw time. Patron art is per-queue-slot (idx % 4), matching the old per-slot colour behavior. bg_beach took 4 compositional regens (sunset pier -> palm scene -> high-horizon w/ cliff [accepted] -> diagonal shoreline); the accepted painting includes a sandstone cliff right + grass tuft the negatives didn't suppress, judged in-world. Lesson re-confirmed: version background candidates to distinct files instead of overwriting (gen-3 had to be re-rolled from its seed). POST-AUDIT (visual-audit, 6 lenses + fresh re-audit, 15/16 confirmed): icon_pearl became raster after all — CROPPED from the painted pearl_ring art via PIL (no standalone gen ever landed); pendant inter-chain grey matte + driftwood fiber sliver cleared via PIL alpha edits; project default_texture_filter=2 (Linear Mipmap) activated the mipmaps. Deferred owner items: themed font asset (engine fallback font everywhere), craft full-screen panel -> bottom-sheet composition, icon register unification (sticker-gloss icons vs flat-cartoon world), CTA cream-on-coral/teal label contrast (~2.2-2.8:1, conventional), patron_c orange hands, pearl-chip pink blotch touch-up, seaglass icon detail. Logic-note for deepen: gather-node spawner has no min-distance constraint (view relaxes overlaps as a workaround).

recipes.name: bg_beach
recipes.prompt: vertical mobile game background of a sunny seaside beach at bright midday, flat bold cartoon, clean simple shapes, vibrant cel shading, sunny storybook style, flat horizontal layered composition viewed straight on, high horizon line: only a thin strip of warm blue sky with a small bright sun at the very top, a calm flat band of turquoise sea just below it, then a huge wide empty bright cream-yellow sandy beach with a few wet shiny patches filling the middle and bottom
recipes.negative: pier, dock, jetty, path, road, bridge, sunset, dusk, orange sky, big sky, perspective, vanishing point, palm tree, plants, people, characters, animals, boats, rocks, cliffs, text, logo, watermark, photorealistic, 3d render, anime, manga, trademarked character, brand
recipes.note: opaque full-frame (no LayerDiffuse), exact 720x1280 viewport aspect

recipes.name: icon_shell
recipes.prompt: scaffold + a single scallop seashell game item icon, fan-shaped shell with radiating ridges, peach and cream colored

recipes.name: icon_driftwood

recipes.name: icon_seaglass
recipes.prompt: scaffold + a single frosted sea glass pebble game item icon, smooth rounded teal-green frosted glass gem with soft sheen

recipes.name: coin
recipes.prompt: scaffold + a single shiny golden coin game item icon, bright yellow gold metal, round coin face with a small scallop shell stamped in the center, thick dark outline (negative += purple, plate, dish, silver, copper)
recipes.note: first attempt rendered a purple plate; colour negatives fixed it

recipes.name: icon_shell_charm
recipes.prompt: scaffold + a single small seashell charm necklace game item icon, one orange scallop shell hanging from a simple golden chain loop above it (negative += corn, rope, washed out, pale)

recipes.name: icon_driftwood_frame
recipes.prompt: scaffold + a single rustic driftwood picture frame game item icon, square frame of tan weathered wood sticks holding a tiny painted picture of a sailboat on the sea (anti-scene negatives relaxed so the inner painting could render)
recipes.note: an EMPTY frame fails twice over: the model fills the hole and LayerDiffuse can't cut it; putting a tiny picture IN the frame is more readable and solves both

recipes.name: icon_seaglass_pendant
recipes.prompt: scaffold + a single sea glass pendant necklace game item icon, teardrop of frosted teal sea glass on a fine golden chain
recipes.note: minor grey matte smudge between the chains, invisible at 34-80px display sizes

recipes.name: icon_wind_chime
recipes.prompt: scaffold + a single wind chime game item icon, three orange scallop seashells dangling on strings beneath a horizontal piece of driftwood (negative += paddle, spoon, utensil, knife, pendant)
recipes.note: took 3 attempts; 'three X dangling' kept collapsing to one blob until the shells were the explicit repeated subject

recipes.name: icon_pearl_ring
recipes.prompt: scaffold + a single gold ring game item icon, jewelry, shiny golden band with one round white pearl mounted on top, upright (negative += shoe, boot, leather, black, hat)

recipes.name: icon_tide_lantern
recipes.prompt: scaffold + a single rustic lantern game item icon, small driftwood-framed lantern with a warm glowing golden light pane and a rope handle

recipes.name: gather_node_pool
recipes.prompt: scaffold + a single small shallow tide pool game item icon seen from above, rounded sandy rock rim around clear sparkling turquoise water (negative += deep, dark)

recipes.name: gather_node_pool_far
recipes.prompt: scaffold + a single small deep tide pool game item icon seen from above, dark wet rock rim around deep dark teal water with ripples (negative += bright, sandy)

recipes.name: patron_a
recipes.prompt: scaffold + a single cheerful very plump round blob-shaped beach villager character, bright coral-orange round body, simple black dot eyes and a happy smile, small straw sun hat, stubby little arms, empty hands, full body (negative += broom, stick, mop, holding object, thin, skinny, stick figure, gray, grey)
recipes.note: 3 attempts (gray blob -> stick figure with broom -> accepted teal-bodied villager; the coral colour word never landed, judged acceptable within the family)

recipes.name: patron_b

audio_system.mood_prompt: warm, sunny, breezy seaside-boardwalk atmosphere, gentle and handcrafted
audio_system.sonic_character: warm wooden KALIMBA / thumb-piano pluck + soft MARIMBA tap (concept.theme: handcrafted seaside) — rounded organic notes, a gentle hand-bell ding for the register beat, light watery plips for the tide pools; NO electronic/synth transients, NO explosive or harsh metallic 'tings'. The SFX draw their material from this vocabulary (audio sibling of the visual world_bible); comfy.mjs envelopeSfxWav shapes loudness and steps 55 (not 8) keeps the tone clean instead of broadband-noisy (verified by ZCR 579-3839/s, all well below noise).

recipes.name: pick
recipes.prompt: warm, sunny, breezy seaside-boardwalk atmosphere, gentle and handcrafted. a single soft kalimba pluck with a gentle watery plip, a small seashell picked up from a tide pool, one short bright cheerful note. warm wooden kalimba thumb-piano pluck, soft marimba tap, no electronic transients, no harsh metallic ting
recipes.negative: music, melody, voice, speech, explosion, harsh, distortion, aggressive, electronic, gunshot, noise burst

recipes.name: bank
recipes.prompt: warm, sunny, breezy seaside-boardwalk atmosphere, gentle and handcrafted. a short warm wooden confirmation chime, two soft kalimba notes rising, a satisfying gentle hand-bell ding, cheerful handcrafted tone. warm wooden kalimba thumb-piano pluck, soft marimba tap, no electronic transients, no harsh metallic ting

recipes.prompt: warm, sunny, breezy seaside-boardwalk atmosphere, gentle and handcrafted. a short handcrafted woody tap-tap, two soft wooden knocks of a tool working driftwood, a gentle marimba click finishing a trinket. warm wooden kalimba thumb-piano pluck, soft marimba tap, no electronic transients, no harsh metallic ting

recipes.name: sale
recipes.prompt: warm, sunny, breezy seaside-boardwalk atmosphere, gentle and handcrafted. a cheerful cozy shop cash-register ding, a bright warm hand-bell chime with a soft single coin jingle, a satisfying happy sale chime. warm wooden kalimba thumb-piano pluck, soft marimba tap, no electronic transients, no harsh metallic ting

recipes.prompt: warm, sunny, breezy seaside-boardwalk atmosphere, gentle and handcrafted. a soft ocean wave washing over sand, a gentle smooth water whoosh sweeping in, calm rolling sea foam, mellow and rounded. warm wooden kalimba thumb-piano pluck, soft marimba tap, no electronic transients, no harsh metallic ting

recipes.name: bgm
recipes.prompt: warm, sunny, breezy seaside-boardwalk atmosphere, gentle and handcrafted. A gentle fingerpicked nylon acoustic guitar seaside lullaby, a simple warm low repeating melody, relaxed cozy folk tune with a steady plucked rhythm, light handcrafted boardwalk feel, mellow and looping
recipes.negative: drone, pad, sustained, monotone, single note, held note, atmosphere, texture, ambient, high pitched, shrill, tinny, bright, harsh, voice, speech, lyrics, vocals

events.signal: haul_full / craft_failed / wrong_item / shelves_full / upgrade_too_poor / upgrade_maxed

audio_pass.notes: Audio identity for the sunny seaside-boardwalk shopkeeper sim (concept.theme), generated locally via Stable Audio Open. 7 SFX + 1 looping bed. SONIC: cozy/organic -> kalimba/marimba warm-wood timbre (sonic_character) threaded into every SFX prompt + theme-aware negatives (explosion/harsh/electronic/gunshot); the register 'sale' beat is the loudest/brightest cue (the cashier hook). All SFX generated at steps 55 (clean tone, not the steps-8 explosive-noise failure); the deterministic comfy.mjs envelope auto-shapes loudness (trim/normalize/fade). Measured clips: SFX ZCR 579-3839/s (all clean, far below noise); BGM rms 0.057. BGM = fingerpicked nylon-guitar low/warm repeating melody with anti-drone + anti-high-pitch negatives + cfg 8 (avoids the ambient-pad-collapses-to-drone failure). WIRING: audio only ADDS AudioStreamPlayer nodes + play() at existing _handle_events points; ShopState logic untouched (SELFTEST OK). The long imported bed is REBUILT in code from its PCM data (bgm.wav.import compress/mode=0) + looped + autoplay-before-add_child (the imported-long-WAV-won't-play gotcha); probe confirms MusicAmbient.playing=true with advancing get_playback_position(). LEVELS: bed volume_db=-2.0 -- the lullaby came back ~RMS 0.057 vs the SFX event level ~0.13 (~7 dB under raw), a small cut seats it audible-but-under the one-shots. Event map: node_collected->pick, banked/upgrade_bought/day_complete->bank, crafted/stocked->craft, sale->sale, tide_returned->tide, patron_left/day_failed->walkout, all deny beats->error. IP-safe: no artist/track names; music negative excludes vocals/lyrics. STATUS ADVANCED to scored (audio pass produced + technically verified); owner ear-judgment A/B still the human gate before packaging.

store_pass.notes: packager v3 icon-research re-package: icon is now a bespoke CHARACTER focal (store/icon_focal.png) — a cheerful beach-villager shopkeeper bust (ComfyUI cartoonArcadiaXL_v2.safetensors, LayerDiffuse seed 70, glossy dimensional 3D-style cartoon), salvage-cropped from a full-body gen to a head-and-shoulders bust per ASO rule 2 (a face with emotion + gaze out-reads an object and fills the frame). Composed by icon_compose.gd into adaptive layers over a radial WARM-HALO background (icon_bg #f7b06a warm centre -> #1c7d78 teal rim) + soft drop shadow; 48px legibility CIELAB ΔE 50.5 (>22 floor). Replaces the v2 coral-shell icon, whose subject the research lens flagged as generic (off-message 'beach' motif) and under-filled. Splash recomposed with the character master on sea-teal. DEFERRED owner gates: final icon/splash aesthetic A/B + real Play submission.
